interface.longDescription: Prospect with Clay inside ChatGPT: run deep company and contact research without leaving your conversation. Use Clay’s contact databases, enrichment providers, and AI agents to research target accounts, surface verified, enriched contact info, and draft personalized outreach—all in ChatGPT. Ask things like “Find VP-level finance leaders at Okta who joined in the last 6 months,” and Clay will return results directly in your chat.
defaultPrompt: Find GTM Leaders at Conclusive AI
